Notice Of Motion To Take Deposition In Foreign Country [Ccp 2027.010, 28 Usc 1781]
Off Calendar Feb-25-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JASON SMITH, ESQ., 714.550.7720 X5029, FOR PLAINTIFF DIETER PFEIFER; NO OTHER APPEARANCES.

RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTs RAINFOREST CAFE, INC. & LANDRY'S INC., UNOPPOSED Motion To Take Deposition In Foreign Country [Ccp 2027.010, 28 Usc 1781] IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES WATSON, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion To Take Deposition In Foreign Country [Ccp 2027.010, 28 Usc 1781]
Off Calendar Feb-14-2013 Continued To Feb-25-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANTs RAINFOREST CAFE, INC. and LANDRY'S INC., ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS LANDRY'S Motion To Take Deposition In Foreign Country [CCP 2027.010, 28 USC 1781] is continued on the court's own motion to February 25, 2013 at 9:00 am in Dept. 302 in order to give defendants RAINFOREST CAFO, INC. and LANDRY'S INC. the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Defendants shall provide courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than February 14, 2013 at 4:00 pm, or the motion will be denied. Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Woodson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported
